hero.title: Dive into the heart of football.
hero.subtitle: Europe's greatest stadiums, as you have never experienced them.

clubs.title: More than 15 clubs available.
clubs.text: Real Madrid, FC Barcelona, Atlético Madrid, Real Sociedad, Athletic Bilbao, Girona, Valencia, Mallorca and many more.

items.title: Interactive tour
items.text: An exclusive immersion behind the scenes of the stadium. Discover the locker rooms, the players' areas, the media zones and walk the legendary tunnel leading to the pitch.

items.title: Match Day & VIP
items.text: Enjoy the match in the finest conditions with the boxes and VIP lounges. Premium hospitality, fine dining and a privileged experience guaranteed.

items.title: Pitch-side moment
items.text: Step onto the pitch before or after the match and live a unique moment at the heart of the stadium. An experience reserved for a privileged few.

items.title: Exclusive experiences
items.text: Private meet-and-greets, special access, personalised tours and bespoke services depending on the clubs and availability.

experiences.title: As many possibilities as there are wishes.

items.passengers: Up to 20 passengers depending on configuration

items.name: Mercedes Coach
items.description: The ideal solution for large groups, seminars, sports events and corporate trips. Reliable, comfortable transport perfectly suited to premium services.

hero.title: Our story
hero.subtitle: A vision born of an obsession with detail.

items.text: The birth of Konciergate, from one conviction: every stay deserves to be unique.
Bringing transport, accommodation, ticketing and experiences together under a single exceptional contact.
A network of hand-picked partners across five European countries.
To become the benchmark for luxury inbound services and football experiences in Europe.

coulisses.title: The invisible work.
coulisses.lead: Behind every experience, meticulous orchestration — from the first contact to the last detail.

apropos.founderBio: From luxury hospitality to elite sport, Nicolas Dufau founded Konciergate on one conviction: true luxury is fluidity. Bringing under a single contact what once required ten.

story.p1: Konciergate was born from a simple, rare standard: to offer every client a European experience considered in the smallest detail, from the first transfer to the last reservation.
story.p2: Transport, accommodation, ticketing, events and football experiences: we bring everything together under a single contact, for absolute fluidity and total discretion.

quote.text: With Konciergate, we want to offer a unique experience to our clients.
quote.author: Nicolas Dufau

items.title: Bespoke
items.text: No standard service. Every detail is designed for your clients.

items.title: Discretion
items.text: Luxury is lived in silence. We remain in the shadow of your success.

items.title: Excellence
items.text: Hand-picked partners, all across Europe.

hero.title: Let's talk about your project.
hero.subtitle: To improve the quality of our services, our teams are at your disposal.

form.name: Name
form.consent: I agree that my data may be processed so that I can be contacted back. I may revoke this consent at any time.
form.success: Thank you. Your message has been sent — we reply within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or write to us directly.

errors.name: Please enter your name (2 characters min.).
errors.email: Please enter a valid e-mail address.
errors.message: Your message must contain at least 10 characters.

footer.tagline: The world, exactly as your clients deserve it.

sections.heading: Site publisher
sections.body: This website is published by Konciergate, 79 avenue des Champs-Élysées, office 326, 75008 Paris, France. Contact: konciergate@gmail.com — +33 6 74 14 66 49.

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: The site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All content (texts, images, the « K. » logo, visual identity) is the exclusive property of Konciergate. Any reproduction without authorisation is prohibited.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: Konciergate strives to ensure the accuracy of the information published but cannot be held liable for any omissions or inaccuracies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Konciergate places the utmost importance on protecting your personal data, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.heading: Data collected
sections.body: Through the contact form, we collect your name, e-mail address and the content of your message, for the sole purpose of replying to your request.

sections.heading: Purpose of processing
sections.body: Your data is used exclusively to handle your request and contact you back. It is never shared or sold to third parties.

sections.heading: Retention period
sections.body: Your data is kept for as long as necessary to process your request, then archived or deleted.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase and object. To exercise it, write to us at konciergate@gmail.com.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: This site uses only cookies strictly necessary for its operation and to remember your language.
